title: Reject mixed producer states during concurrent correction
preconditions: Version-compatible BUDGET and LEDGER producer doubles or implementations can pause between plan, position, and dated-actual evidence reads.
steps: Generate once without writes, then inject a correction at every cross-read boundary, cursor expiry, duplicate and missing ordinals, stale generation, unknown category, total mismatch, no-plan, and no-active-revision cases.
expected: Stable coherent evidence reconciles exactly; every mixed or incomplete state returns the named failure with no report or retention; plan absence states remain explicit.
